message:
test(core): cross-module integration tests for tantivy ingest + query pipeline (wa-x1vd)

42 tests covering the full ingest → search pipeline: event mapping,
filter accuracy (pane, session, time range, direction, event type),
ranking/scoring, cursor pagination, snippet extraction, redaction
behavior, multi-pane isolation, and realistic agent workflow scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
